summary: Comprehensive testing of Mira AI pet concierge system with enriched pet soul data (50+ fields per pet). All 10 backend API tests PASS. Key findings: 1) Soul data is correctly stored and retrieved via API, 2) Mira correctly uses pet-specific data for health conditions, allergies, and personalization, 3) Emergency triage works correctly, 4) _memory_trace is returned in responses showing known fields used.

minor.issue: _memory_trace is empty when asking about treats for Mystique via UI (Lola was selected, not Mystique). Backend API tests confirm _memory_trace works when correct pet_context is passed.

integration_issues.issue: When asking 'What treats can I give Mystique safely?' while Lola is selected, Mira responds about Mystique but doesn't have her full soul data because Lola's context is being used. User must switch pet first.

critical_code_review_comments: Pet soul data (doggy_soul_answers) is correctly populated with 50+ fields for test pets (Mystique, Lola, Meister, Bruno, Luna)
Mira correctly uses health data - Meister's heart condition, low sodium diet, and anxiety triggers are all acknowledged
Emergency protocol triggers correctly for chocolate ingestion scenarios
Soul Learning Engine is working - _memory_trace shows known_fields_used when pet_context is properly passed
Travel recommendations correctly consider pet's anxiety level and medical conditions
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_pet_soul_enriched_data.py - Created comprehensive test suite for Pet Soul data verification

test_pets: Meister - Senior, heart condition, severe anxiety
Bruno - Young, high energy, loves swimming

seed_data_creation: Used existing enriched pets from /app/backend/scripts/enrich_pet_souls.py script
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pet Soul enrichment data is comprehensive (50+ fields per pet). All pillars tested: Health-First Safety Rule PASS, Emergency Triage PASS, Personalization PASS, Fear/Anxiety Awareness PASS, Soul Learning PASS, Celebrate Pillar PASS, Travel Pillar PASS. _memory_trace is returned showing memory used. Frontend requires user to select correct pet before asking pet-specific questions.

verified_features.health_first_safety_rule: PASS - Mira acknowledges Mystique's chicken allergy and Meister's heart condition
verified_features.emergency_triage: PASS - Chocolate emergency triggers immediate vet/emergency contact guidance
verified_features.personalization: PASS - Bruno gets active activity recommendations (swimming, hiking, fetch)
verified_features.fear_anxiety_awareness: PASS - Meister's travel recommendations acknowledge anxiety and avoid flight suggestions
verified_features.soul_learning_memory_trace: PASS - _memory_trace returned with known_fields_used including allergies, anxiety_triggers, temperament
verified_features.celebrate_pillar: PASS - Lola birthday planning uses pet preferences
verified_features.travel_pillar_joint_friendly: PASS - Luna's hip dysplasia is acknowledged with low-impact travel suggestions

gaps_identified: UI: When asking about a different pet name than selected, Mira doesn't automatically switch context
Minor: _memory_trace was empty in one test when pet_context wasn't fully passed
